summary: Iteration 30 - Frontend testing for multi-tenant restaurant management system. Tested: Owner login, POS table section filtering, Tables management with add/delete functionality. Fixed permission bug for super_admin role in table create/delete endpoints.
passed_tests: POS page - Table section filter buttons displayed (الكل، القاعة الرئيسية، داخلي، خارجي، VIP)
POS page - Clicking section filter correctly filters tables (داخلي: 3 tables, VIP: 4 tables, الكل: 24 tables)
POS page - Categories displayed with images (برغر، بيتزا، مشروبات، حلويات، سلطات)
POS page - Products displayed with images (برغر كلاسيك، برغر دبل)
Tables management - Page loads with tables displayed
Tables management - Add table button visible
Tables management - Delete buttons visible on available tables
Tables management - Add new table with section selection (VIP) - successful
Tables management - Delete table - successful (after fix)
Tables management - Stats update correctly after add/delete

pos_table_filtering.notes: Clicking section button correctly filters tables displayed

pos_categories_products.notes: Categories and products display with images

features: Add new table with section selection

table_add.notes: Added table 100 in VIP section successfully

table_delete.notes: Delete confirmation dialog works, table removed successfully

bugs_fixed.issue: super_admin role could not create or delete tables
bugs_fixed.root_cause: create_table and delete_table endpoints only allowed 'admin' and 'manager' roles, not 'super_admin'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'super_admin' to allowed roles in both endpoints

critical_code_review_comments: POS.js lines 1062-1160: Table section filtering implemented correctly with dynamic section buttons
Tables.js lines 100-143: Delete table functionality with confirmation dialog implemented correctly
server.py lines 4034-4050: Delete table endpoint now includes super_admin role
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added super_admin to allowed roles for create_table and delete_table endpoints
seed_data_creation: Added table 100 in VIP section for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 completed successfully. All requested features verified: 1) Owner login working, 2) POS page shows table section filter buttons (الكل، داخلي، خارجي، VIP) and filtering works correctly, 3) Categories and products display with images, 4) Tables management page shows tables with delete buttons, 5) Add table with section selection works, 6) Delete table works (after fixing super_admin permission). Fixed bug: super_admin role was not allowed to create/delete tables - added to allowed roles in server.py.
